name: claw-web-chat
description: Web chat interface for claw-code AI programming assistant

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c green,cyan "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:admin: powershell -Command "Start-Process cmd -ArgumentList '/c cd /d %cd% && npm run dev' -Verb RunAs"
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:backend
